seoTitle: How to Create a Gantt Chart in ClickUp
metaDescription: Learn how to add a Gantt chart view in ClickUp, draw task dependencies, highlight the critical path, and mark project milestones.
intro: A Gantt chart gives you a visual timeline of how tasks connect and depend on each other, which is useful once a project has more than a handful of moving parts. This guide covers adding a native Gantt view in ClickUp, drawing dependency connections between tasks, and using the critical path feature to see exactly which tasks are directly affecting your final deadline.

steps.heading: Add a Gantt view
steps.body: Open your target list and click '+ View', then select Gantt from the app view drawer to add it to your project.

steps.heading: Adjust the timeline zoom
steps.body: Review your horizontal timeline layout and adjust the zoom scale to view tasks by days, weeks, or months.

steps.heading: Draw task dependencies
steps.body: Hover over a task bar and drag the connector node to another task to create a dependency, marking it as blocking or waiting on that task.

steps.heading: Enable automated rescheduling
steps.body: Turn on the automated rescheduling engine so linked tasks shift together when you move a connected task's dates.

steps.heading: Highlight the critical path
steps.body: Click the path icon in the top toolbar to instantly highlight the sequence of tasks directly affecting your project deadline.

steps.heading: Add milestones
steps.body: Right-click a task bar and convert it into a diamond-shaped milestone marker to highlight key phase handoffs or delivery targets.

faq.question: Does moving one task automatically shift dependent tasks?
faq.answer: Yes, if you enable the automated rescheduling engine, downstream dependent tasks adjust automatically when you reschedule a connected task.

faq.question: What does the critical path show me?
faq.answer: It visually isolates the sequence of tasks that directly affect your project's final deadline, helping you spot where delays would cause the most impact.

faq.question: Can I group Gantt tasks by team member?
faq.answer: Yes, grouping filters let you re-sort your Gantt chart by individual assignees or other attributes.

faq.question: Is the Gantt view available in every ClickUp plan?
faq.answer: Gantt charts are a core ClickUp view, though availability and advanced features can vary depending on your plan tier.
